name: security_ops
description: Security operations skill for threat detection, access auditing, compliance checking, and risk assessment using SPL and MITRE ATT&CK.
author: ObsAI Team

mitre_version.description: MITRE ATT&CK framework version to reference

risk_threshold.description: Default risk score threshold for alerts (0-100)

actions.name: detect_threats
actions.description: Generate threat detection SPL queries from MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs or names. Produces ready-to-use correlation searches.

technique.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique ID (e.g., T1059) or name (e.g., 'Command and Scripting Interpreter')

actions.name: audit_access
actions.description: Generate audit queries for access patterns, privilege escalation, and anomalous login behavior.

actions.name: check_compliance
actions.description: Check configurations against CIS benchmarks and security best practices for Splunk deployments.

config.description: Configuration content or description to check (e.g., props.conf content, deployment description)

actions.name: assess_risk
actions.description: Assess risk score based on query patterns, data exposure, and security indicators.

query.description: SPL query or activity description to assess for risk
